_comment: Flow 02 — EU full pattern at Bern LSZB (tower-only, no separate Ground frequency). All exchanges happen on TOWER. Mirrors the docs §6 Phase 3 approach/arrival for LSZB and the pattern subset of §5. Tower handles taxi, clearance, land, runway vacated + taxi-to-parking in a single radio dialog.
name: EU pattern — LSZB Bern (tower-only)

say.text: Bern Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi

say.note: Step 2 — Tower: holding short, ready for departure
say.text: Bern Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding short ready for departure
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo midfield left downwind
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo on final full stop

say.note: Step 5 — Tower: runway vacated (tower-only bundles the taxi clearance instead of handing off to a non-existent Ground)
say.text: Bern Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo clear of the runway

say.note: Step 6 — Tower: request taxi to parking (tower-only keeps the radio on Tower)
say.text: Bern Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo request taxi to general aviation parking
